title: Fix server-agent integration SIGSEGV
description: Diagnose and fix the segmentation fault in integration_tests/server_agent_integration_test.cpp when the test logs in to the server API after server startup. The likely scope is the integration harness startup/readiness path, the API server thread, or shared server state accessed by API and ZMQ worker threads.
acceptance_criteria: The server-agent integration test no longer crashes with SIGSEGV at the login wait.
The integration test still verifies enrollment approval, metric ingestion, and disconnect lifecycle behavior.
The change is documented in docs and CHANGELOG.md, and the module version is incremented for this change set.

tasks.title: Reproduce and isolate the crash
tasks.description: Run the failing integration test and inspect the server, API, and agent lifecycle code around startup, request handling, and teardown.
acceptance_criteria: The crash has a concrete suspected owner in code, not just the reported Catch2 line.

integration: Run //integration_tests:server_agent_integration_test and capture the failure mode.

tasks.implementation_notes: The crash reproduced after login passed and before the next authenticated route assertion reported. server/api.cpp registered callbacks that captured stack-local helper lambdas from ApiServer::setup_routes(), so authenticated callbacks dereferenced destroyed helper objects.

tasks.title: Apply the lifecycle fix
tasks.description: Make the smallest code change that removes the unsafe lifecycle or concurrency behavior while preserving the test's end-to-end behavior.
acceptance_criteria: The server API is stable during startup and the real agent can enroll and send metrics.

integration: Run the server-agent integration test after the fix.

tasks.implementation_notes: Moved session, authorization, agent-access, and simple-command helper logic to ApiServer methods in server/api.cpp and server/api.hpp. Route callbacks now capture this or copied values, removing dangling references.

tasks.title: Document and version the fix
tasks.description: Update MODULE.bazel, CHANGELOG.md, and relevant docs after the code fix.
acceptance_criteria: Version and docs reflect the integration stability change.
tasks.implementation_notes: Bumped MODULE.bazel to 0.2.22, added CHANGELOG.md entry, and documented safe httplib callback capture expectations in docs/development.md.
